summary: Tested Twilio SMS Settings API (backend) and Settings page UI (frontend). All 4 backend API tests passed. Frontend Twilio card renders correctly with all required form fields and data-testid attributes. Razorpay, WhatsApp, and Data Management sections all still visible.
seed_data_creation: Saved test Twilio credentials (TEST_ACxxx, +15551234567) to DB during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Twilio feature fully working. Settings page has 4 sections: Razorpay, Twilio SMS Alerts (new), WhatsApp Webhook, Data Management. Backend: GET/POST /api/settings/twilio both work. Frontend: data-testid attrs twilio-settings-form, twilio-account-sid-input, twilio-auth-token-input, twilio-phone-input, save-twilio-button all present.
